data.title: Monalytic Achieves Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Monalytic, a SolarWinds subsidiary specializing in monitoring, analytics, and professional services, revealed they have attained Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 for all 110 NIST SP 800-171 controls. This achievement establishes Monalytic as compliant with Department of War (DoW) cybersecurity guidelines for handling Controlled Unclassified Information.

data.title: Qlik AI Council Calls on Companies to Prepare for the Hard Part of AI
data.description: A recent announcement states that in Kissimmee, Florida, the AI Council led by Qlik has highlighted important changes companies need to anticipate as artificial intelligence (AI) advances further into decision support, workflow execution, and operations. The Council emphasizes the necessity for businesses to prepare for these transformations.

data.title: A Record 34% of February Home Sellers Cut Their List Price
data.description: In Seattle, a report from Redfin revealed that in February, 34.2% of home sellers reduced their list price, showing an increase from 31.5% the previous year. This marks the highest share for February since data has been recorded since 2012. On average, sellers who reduced their list price did so by $40,915, which is a 7.3% decrease and the highest percentage for February since 2013. These figures indicate a notable trend in the housing market, highlighting potential challenges for sellers.

data.title: Deliverect Launches AI Agents and Smart Assistants to Supercharge Restaurant Sales, Protect Digital Revenue, and Maximise Efficiency
data.description: A cutting-edge digital revenue optimization tool is being introduced to clients in the UK, with plans to launch in Australia, New Zealand, and North America. The platform, provided by Deliverect, a leading restaurant technology company, currently serves over 95,000 establishments worldwide across 78 countries. The announcement was made on April 9, 2026, from New York and London.

data.title: Great Lakes State Chapters Join Forces to Lead Financial Education and Policy Initiatives
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, as of April 9, 2026, the National Financial Educators Council® (NFEC) is showcasing its growth in the Great Lakes Region, with strong presence in Illinois, Michigan, Ohio, and Wisconsin. The organization's state chapters in these areas are actively promoting financial literacy, reaching out to a combined population of over 32 million residents. The NFEC's efforts in these states serve to improve the financial knowledge and skills of individuals, advancing their ability to make informed money-related decisions.

data.title: The National Police Association Endorses the De-escalation Drone Pilot Program Act
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Indianapolis, it was reported that police officers facing active shooter scenarios and high-stakes calls frequently lack crucial information upon arrival, affecting their ability to respond effectively. This puts them in a disadvantaged position strategically. In critical situations where lives are at risk, the integration of drone technology could provide valuable support, potentially improving response capabilities and outcomes.

data.title: Frontdoor, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc., a prominent home warranty provider in the U.S. listed on NASDAQ as FTDR, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of the fiscal year 2026. The company scheduled a conference call for Thursday, April 30, 2026, set for 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). Interested parties can sign up for the webcast at https://www.webcaster5.com/Webcast/Page/3067/53785, featuring a detailed slide presentation showcasing the company's outcomes. Following the presentation, attendees will have the opportunity to engage in Q&A.

data.title: Leo Announces Merger of Academy Locksmith and Firstline Lock and Door to Form Academy Access Solutions
data.description: Leo, a top facilities maintenance platform based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas, has revealed the merger of Academy Locksmith and Firstline Lock and Door. This merger has resulted in the establishment of Academy Access Solutions, a comprehensive provider of commercial access, security, and facility opening services throughout the United States. This single-source entity offers solutions for every facility entry point, promising local expertise and responsiveness on a national scale. The merger aims to enhance services and expand accessibility, catering to a wider audience across the country.

data.title: Ampd Creates First to Market Frictionless Shopper Journey with the Launch of Agentic Shoppable Media
data.description: A new solution named Agentic Shoppable Media has been introduced by Ampd in Seattle on April 9, 2026. This solution aims to enhance traffic, customer experience, and sales velocity by matching shoppers with retailers. Ampd, the provider of this solution, specializes in linking brand media with commerce. The launch of Agentic Shoppable Media is set to revolutionize how brands interact with customers, potentially leading to a significant increase in traffic, improved customer experience, and faster sales. This development marks a milestone in the retail industry and is expected to have a noteworthy impact on the way brands and consumers connect.

data.title: First-Time Business Owner Opens New PostalAnnex Location in Schaumburg, Illinois
data.description: The latest expansion of Annex Brands, Inc., a prominent franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services sectors, includes the inauguration of a new franchise location in San Diego on April 9, 2026. This development signifies the company's ongoing efforts to grow its footprint in the industry.

data.title: Eos Energy Enterprises Reports Preliminary Q1 Revenue, Highlights Record Output and Capacity Expansion
data.description: Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE), a prominent US energy firm specializing in zinc-based battery energy storage systems, revealed its anticipation of reporting around $56 - $57 million in revenue for the initial quarter of 2026. The company's emphasis on record shipments and manufacturing productivity has showcased a positive trajectory in operational expansion.

data.title: Spectral AI to showcase DeepView® System at 2026 ABA Annual Meeting.
data.description: Last month, the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. This decline was coupled with an increase of 467,000 jobs added in sectors such as hospitality, healthcare, and professional services. The total number of unemployed persons decreased by 2.8 million to 6.9 million. Despite the positive trend, some industries like manufacturing and retail continue to struggle with low employment rates. Economists are optimistic about the future job market as businesses reopen and the economy gradually recovers from the pandemic.

data.title: Giftify’s CardCash Reports Strong Buy-Side Order Volume Growth Through Early Q1 2026, with Buy-to-Sell Ratio Reflecting Healthy Marketplace Demand
data.description: In the period leading up to March 22, CardCash saw a significant increase in buy orders processed, with a total of 112,084 orders completed. This is a notable rise from the 105,583 orders processed during the same period in the previous year. The surge in buy-side activity on the platform indicates a growing momentum as spring approaches.

data.title: NeoVolta Named 2026 “Energy Storage Company of the Year” by CleanTech Breakthrough
data.description: NeoVolta has been recognized by a prestigious global clean technology awards program for its outstanding performance in product leadership, market traction, and role in advancing energy storage adoption in the real world. This acknowledgment highlights NeoVolta's success and impact in the industry. The company's achievements have earned it a place of distinction among competitors, signifying its significant contributions to clean energy solutions. This recognition reinforces NeoVolta's position as a key player in the push for widespread adoption of energy storage technologies.

data.title: Aureus Greenway Holdings Announces $50 Million Strategic Investment in Powerus from KCGI
data.description: Funding has been secured to bolster Powerus's manufacturing capabilities in the United States and South Korea as they gear up to cater to the increasing need for locally-made autonomous defense systems. The combined entity is projected to debut on the Nasdaq stock exchange using the ticker symbol "PUSA" following the finalization of the investment.

data.title: Eagle Nuclear Energy Engages Drilling Company And Files Permit Applications For PFS-Related Drill Program at Aurora
data.description: Eagle has finalized arrangements with Harris Exploration Drilling to secure drill rigs for its upcoming PFS-related drill program. Additionally, SLR has submitted permit applications to both the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) and the Department of Geology and Mineral Industries (DOGAMI) for the drill program. The company is preparing to commence the program with these critical permits in place.

data.title: AlphaTON Market Update: GAMEE Q1 Performance Highlights 56% YoY Revenue Growth with over 88.5 million Game Plays
data.description: Update on the AlphaTON market reveals GAMEE's first-quarter performance, showcasing a remarkable 56% Year-over-Year revenue growth. The platform boasted over 88.5 million game plays during this period.
